creator: satoshi@example.com
text:
The CHECKSUM.MD5 files are missing from all of the stable
packages directories below. Perhaps something broke in the
move to pkg. Anyway, can you generate them please so they can
make it out to the mirrors? Thanks.

ftp://ftp.freebsd.org/pub/FreeBSD/ports/i386/packages-8-stable/All/
ftp://ftp.freebsd.org/pub/FreeBSD/ports/i386/packages-9-stable/All/
ftp://ftp.freebsd.org/pub/FreeBSD/ports/amd64/packages-8-stable/All/
ftp://ftp.freebsd.org/pub/FreeBSD/ports/amd64/packages-9-stable/All/
